name: Berry Bread
recipeInstructions:
Makes 2 loaves
Combine the flour, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt in a bowl. Set aside.
In a large bowl of electric mixer, combine the oil, eggs, and sugar. Mix well.
Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring until just moistened.
Stir in the berries and nuts.
Spoon the mixture into 2 greased and floured loaf pans.
Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Cool in pans for 10 minutes; then remove to wire racks to cool completely.
These freeze well; make multiple loaves with extra berries.
